display_text: Vladmir's Offering, Cost: 2200: Core team fight role as a force multiplier. The aura provides 20% lifesteal, 18% bonus damage, 2 armor, and 1 mana regeneration to all nearby allies, making grouped pushes and five-man team fights dramatically stronger. The lifesteal on creeps is reduced to 12%. Stats: Lifesteal Aura: 20%, Damage Aura: 18%, Armor Aura: 2, Mana Regen Aura: 1.

display_text: Vladmir's Offering, Cost: 2200: Situational pick when your team has multiple physical damage cores who benefit from lifesteal and damage (e.g., melee carries, illusion heroes). Especially powerful with heroes who already have high base damage or attack speed, as the percentage-based bonuses scale well. Less effective if your team relies primarily on magical damage or is split-pushing.
